type_definitions.name: render_contract_map
type_definitions.description: Pure domain free function (not a struct or trait) converting per-layer type catalogues into a single-file mermaid Contract Map markdown. This entry declares the existence requirement for the 14th TypeDefinitionKind variant (free_function). Phase 2 tasks IN-01 and IN-09 add FreeFunction to catalogue.rs and catalogue_codec.rs respectively, enabling this free function to appear as a rendered node in the contract-map (L4 fix: free function nodes were previously not renderable). The expected_params and expected_returns fields are declared in the domain variant for future renderer use (return-type and param-type edges are out-of-scope for Phase 2). Declared as value_object temporarily until codec support is merged (AC-01). action=reference so that after kind is updated to free_function in T010, the node receives unused_reference dashed border (no edges yet, param/return edge rendering is Phase 3).

informal_grounds.summary: Declared as value_object placeholder because free_function kind is not yet in catalogue_codec.rs (IN-09 task); Yellow signal expected until codec adds FreeFunction variant (AC-01)

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueEntry
type_definitions.description: Existing domain struct extended in Phase 2 to carry expected_members: Vec<MemberDeclaration> so that field edge generation (IN-05/IN-08) can retrieve struct field declarations from dto/command/query/value_object entries. The new field is optional for backwards compatibility. Declared with action=modify to reflect the structural extension against baseline.

type_definitions.name: LayerId
type_definitions.description: Existing domain value object (newtype around architecture-rules.json layer crate name). Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map edge visualisation.

type_definitions.name: ContractMapContent
type_definitions.description: Existing domain value object (newtype around rendered contract-map markdown string). Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: ContractMapRenderOptions
type_definitions.description: Existing domain value object carrying render configuration. Phase 2 activates the signal_overlay and action_overlay fields (previously stubs in Phase 1). The type shape is unchanged — only the renderer behaviour changes. Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLoader
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary port bulk-loading per-layer type catalogues. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: ContractMapWriter
type_definitions.description: Existing secondary port atomically writing rendered contract-map content. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

informal_grounds.summary: Driven port pattern: ContractMapWriter abstracts filesystem write for contract-map.md; referenced by RenderContractMapInteractor. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring; promote to spec_refs once a GO/IN element directly naming this port is added.

type_definitions.name: CatalogueLoaderError
type_definitions.description: Existing error type for CatalogueLoader implementations. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

informal_grounds.summary: Error type for the CatalogueLoader secondary port; referenced as the error variant in load_all return type. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring; promote to spec_refs once a spec element directly names this error type.

type_definitions.name: ContractMapWriterError
type_definitions.description: Existing error type for ContractMapWriter implementations. Pre-exists from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

informal_grounds.summary: Error type for the ContractMapWriter secondary port; referenced as the error variant in write return type. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring; promote to spec_refs once a spec element directly names this error type.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueDocument
type_definitions.description: Existing domain aggregate root used by the render_contract_map function. The signals() method provides signal data for signal_overlay (IN-07, ADR §Q2 front-end recommendation). Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: ValidationError
type_definitions.description: Existing domain validation error enum. No new variants added in this track. Declared with action=modify (declaration-only, no expected_methods) to serve as the L2 exemplar for the declaration_only classDef (IN-04/AC-04): action=modify + empty expected_methods + no edge → dashed border.

type_definitions.name: TrackId
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier for track slugs. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map parameter-edge visualisation.

informal_grounds.summary: TrackId is a parameter in CatalogueLoader.load_all and ContractMapWriter.write; referenced as method parameter for contract-map render workflow. Declared prior to Phase 2 spec element authoring with a dedicated anchor; reachable via IN-07 (signal_overlay reads TypeCatalogueDocument which is loaded per TrackId).

type_definitions.name: TaskId
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map forward-reference placeholder visualisation (L1 category — will render with unused_reference classDef after IN-03 is implemented).

type_definitions.name: CommitHash
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map forward-reference placeholder visualisation (L1 category — unused_reference classDef after IN-03).

type_definitions.name: TrackBranch
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map forward-reference placeholder visualisation (L1 category — unused_reference classDef after IN-03).

type_definitions.name: NonEmptyString
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map forward-reference placeholder visualisation (L1 category — unused_reference classDef after IN-03).

type_definitions.name: ReviewGroupName
type_definitions.description: Existing domain identifier. Declared with action=reference for Contract Map forward-reference placeholder visualisation (L1 category — unused_reference classDef after IN-03).

type_definitions.name: MemberDeclaration
type_definitions.description: Existing domain enum (Variant | Field) used by TypeCatalogueEntry.expected_members for field edge generation (IN-05/IN-08). The Field variant carries name + ty for struct field references. Declared with action=reference since the type pre-exists and is not modified by this track.
